messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.

What is the Region Proposal Network (RPN) used for in object detection?
A) Proposing candidate regions for objects
B) Extracting features from objects
C) Classifying objects
D) Regressing bounding box coordinates
A) Proposing candidate regions for objects.

The Region Proposal Network (RPN) is a crucial component in object detection algorithms. It is responsible for generating a set of potential bounding box proposals that likely contain objects within an image. These proposals are then further evaluated and refined by subsequent stages of the object detection pipeline.
